content: Tailwind v3 supports CSS-custom-property-driven colors with opacity modifiers via the pattern theme.extend.colors.X = 'rgb(var(--color-x) / <alpha-value>)', with --color-x defined as space-separated RGB channel values (e.g. '37 99 235') in a CSS layer. Tailwind replaces <alpha-value> at build time for /NN opacity modifiers and plain usage.
